author: doll-agent
content: Implemented in ferray-ufunc/src/dispatch.rs. 4 new pulp::WithSimd impls (AbsF32Op/NegF32Op/SquareF32Op/ReciprocalF32Op) + matching simd_*_f32 dispatch entries + try_simd_f32_unary helper + wire-up in ops/arithmetic.rs (absolute/negative/reciprocal/square). Existing 513 ferray-ufunc tests cover correctness; 244 unit + 21 oracle + 12 property linalg tests pass; clippy -D warnings clean; statistical_equivalence.py 47/47 PASS. Lane width on AVX2: 8 f32 lanes per ymm vs 4 f64.
